Beginner.description: Always walking around the castle grounds and somehow knows everyone's age.

Buried beneath the ground, who knows where it's found.

Lucky for you, A man called Reldo may have a clue.
In the place Duke Horacio calls home, talk to a man with a hat dropped by goblins.
In a village of barbarians, I am the one who guards the village from up high.
Talk to Charlie the Tramp in Varrock.
Near the open desert I reside, to get past me you must abide. Go forward if you dare, for when you pass me, you'll be sweating by your hair.

Blow a raspberry at Aris in her tent.

Equip a gold ring and a gold necklace.
Bow to Brugsen Bursen at the Grand Exchange.

Cheer at Iffie Nitter.

Equip a chef's hat and a red cape.

Clap at Bob's Brilliant Axes.

Equip a bronze axe and leather boots.

Easy.description: A crate found in the tower of a church is your next location.
Belladonna, my dear. If only I had gloves, then I could hold you at last.
Dig at a waterfall by the pines in the serpent's shadow.
Dig between some ominous stones in Falador.
Dig by the Giant's Den entrance, looking out over Lake Molch.
Dig in the centre of a great kingdom of 5 cities.
Dig near some giant mushrooms, behind the Grand Tree.
Dig outside the bank on Aldarin.
Dig under Ithoi's cabin.
Dig where only the skilled, the wealthy, or the brave can choose not to visit again.
He's been studying unusual tree migrations.

I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music>

Thanks, Cecilia
I wonder how many bronze swords he has handed out.
I would make a chemistry joke, but I'm afraid I wouldn't get a reaction.
I wouldn't wear this jean on my legs.
Look in the ground floor crates of houses in Falador.
Monk's residence in the far west. See robe storage device.
One of the sailors in Port Sarim is your next destination.
Salty peter.
Search a bookcase in Lumbridge swamp.
Search a bookcase in the Wizards tower.
Search a wardrobe in Draynor.
Search the chest in Fred the Farmer's bedroom.
Search chests found in the upstairs of shops in Port Sarim.
Search for a crate in a building in Hemenster.
Search for a crate in Varrock Castle.
Search for a crate on the ground floor of a house in Seers' Village.
Search the bookcase in the monastery.
Search the food barrel at the top of the Hunter Guild.
Search the eastern bookcase in Father Urhney's house.
Search the boxes in a shop in Taverley.
Search the boxes in one of the tents in Al Kharid.
Search the boxes in the goblin house near Lumbridge.
Search the boxes in the house near the south entrance to Varrock.
Search the boxes just outside the Armour shop in East Ardougne.
Search the boxes of Falador's general store.
Search the boxes next to a chest that needs a crystal key.
Search the bucket in the Port Sarim jail.
Search the bush at the digsite centre.
Search the chest in Barbarian Village.
Search the chest in the Duke of Lumbridge's bedroom.
Search the chest in the left-hand tower of Camelot Castle.
Search the chests in the Dwarven Mine.
Search the chests upstairs in Al Kharid Palace.
Search the Coffin in Edgeville.
Search the crate in the left-hand tower of Lumbridge Castle.
Search the crate in the Toad and Chicken pub.
Search the crate near a cart in Port Khazard.
Search the crates in a bank in Varrock.
Search the crates in a house in Yanille that has a piano.
Search the crates in Canifis.
Search the crates in Draynor Manor.
Search the crates in East Ardougne's general store.
Search the crates in Falador General store.
Search the crates in Horvik's armoury.
Search the crates in the Barbarian Village helmet shop.
Search the crates in the Dwarven mine.
Search the crates in the fruit store just east of the Hosidius town centre.
Search the crates in the guard house of the northern gate of East Ardougne.
Search the crates in the most north-western house in Al Kharid.
Search the crates in the outhouse of the long building in Taverley.
Search the crates in the Port Sarim Fishing shop.
Search the crate in Rommiks crafting shop in Rimmington.
Search the crates in the shed just north of East Ardougne.
Search the crates near a cart in Varrock.
Search the single crate in Horvik's smithy in Varrock.
Search the drawers above Varrock's shops.
Search the drawers found upstairs in East Ardougne's houses.
Search the drawers in a house in Draynor Village.
Search the drawers in Catherby's Archery shop.
Search the drawers in Falador's chain mail shop.
Search the drawers in one of Gertrude's bedrooms.
Search the drawers in the ground floor of a shop in Yanille.
Search the drawers in the house next to the Port Sarim mage shop.
Search the drawers in the upstairs of a house in Catherby.
Search the drawers of houses in Burthorpe.
Search the drawers on the ground floor of a building facing Ardougne's Market.
Search the drawers upstairs in Falador's shield shop.
Search the drawers upstairs in the bank to the East of Varrock.
Search the drawers downstairs of houses in the eastern part of Falador.
Search the open crate found in the Hosidius kitchens.
Search the tents in the Imperial Guard camp in Burthorpe for some boxes.
Search the wheelbarrow in Rimmington mine.
Search through chests found in the upstairs of houses in eastern Falador.
Search through some drawers in the upstairs of a house in Rimmington.
Search through some drawers found in Taverley's houses.
Search upstairs in the houses of Seers' Village for some drawers.
Someone watching the fights in the Emir's Arena is your next destination.
Speak to Arhein in Catherby.
Speak to Doric, who lives north of Falador.
Speak to Ellis in Al Kharid.
Speak to Gaius in Taverley.
Speak to Hans to solve the clue.
Speak to Jatix in Taverley.
Speak to Ned in Draynor Village.
Speak to Rusty north of Falador.
Speak to Sarah at Falador farm.
Speak to Sir Kay in Camelot Castle.
Speak to the bartender of the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.
Speak to the Lady of the Lake.
Speak to the staff of Sinclair mansion.
Strength potions with red spiders' eggs? He is quite a herbalist.
Surrounded by white walls and gems.
Talk to Ali the Leaflet Dropper north of the Al Kharid mine.
Talk to Ambassador Spanfipple in the White Knights Castle.
Talk to a party-goer in Falador.
Talk to Cassie in Falador.
Talk to Charles at Port Piscarilius.
Talk to the cook in the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.
Talk to Ermin.
Talk to the barber in the Falador barber shop.
Talk to the bartender of the Rusty Anchor in Port Sarim.
Talk to the Doomsayer.
Talk to Morgan in his house at Draynor Village.
Talk to the mother of a basement dwelling son.
Talk to the Squire in the White Knights' castle in Falador.
Talk to Turael in Burthorpe.
Talk to Wayne at Wayne's Chains in Falador.
Talk to Zeke in Al Kharid.
Thanks, Grandma!
The hand ain't listening.

Blow a raspberry at the monkey cage in Ardougne Zoo.

Equip a studded leather body, bronze platelegs and a normal staff with no orb.

Blow raspberries outside the entrance to Keep Le Faye.

Equip a coif, an iron platebody and leather gloves.

Bow in the office of the Emir's Arena.

Equip an iron chain body, leather chaps and coif.

Bow outside the entrance to the Legends' Guild.

Equip iron platelegs, an emerald amulet and an oak longbow.

Cheer at the Druids' Circle.

Equip a blue wizard hat, a bronze two-handed sword and HAM boots.

Cheer at the games room.

Have nothing equipped at all when you do.

Cheer for the monks at Port Sarim.

Equip a coif, steel plateskirt and a sapphire necklace.

Clap in the main exam room in the Exam Centre.

Equip a white apron, green gnome boots and leather gloves.

Clap on the causeway to the Wizards' Tower.

Equip an iron medium helmet, emerald ring and a white apron.

Clap on the top level of the mill, north of East Ardougne.

Equip a blue gnome robe top, HAM robe bottom and an unenchanted tiara.

Dance a jig behind the bar on the Pandemonium.

Equip a right eye patch and a bronze scimitar.

Dance a jig by the entrance to the Fishing Guild.

Equip an emerald ring, a sapphire amulet, and a bronze chain body.

Dance at the crossroads north of Draynor.

Equip an iron chain body, a sapphire ring and a longbow.

Dance at the entrance to the Grand Exchange.

Equip a pink skirt, pink robe top and a body tiara.

Dance in the Party Room.

Equip a steel full helmet, steel platebody and an iron plateskirt.

Dance in the shack in Lumbridge Swamp.

Equip a bronze dagger, iron full helmet and a gold ring.

Do a jig in Varrock's rune store.

Equip an air tiara and a staff of water.

Headbang in the mine north of Al Kharid.

Equip a desert shirt, leather gloves and leather boots.

Jump for joy at the beehives.

Equip a desert shirt, green gnome robe bottoms and a steel axe.

Laugh at the crossroads south of the Sinclair mansion.

Equip a cowl, a blue wizard robe top and an iron scimitar.

Panic in the Limestone Mine.

Equip bronze platelegs, a steel pickaxe and a steel medium helmet.

Panic on the pier where you catch the Fishing trawler.

Have nothing equipped at all when you do.

Shrug in the mine near Rimmington.

Equip a gold necklace, a gold ring and a bronze spear.

Spin at the crossroads north of Rimmington.

Equip a green gnome hat, cream gnome top and leather chaps.

Spin in Draynor Manor by the fountain.

Equip an iron platebody, studded leather chaps and a bronze full helmet.

Spin in the Varrock Castle courtyard.

Equip a black axe, a coif and a ruby ring.

Think in middle of the wheat field by the Lumbridge mill.

Equip a blue gnome robetop, a turquoise gnome robe bottom and an oak shortbow.

Wave along the south fence of the Lumber Yard.

Equip a hard leather body, leather chaps and a bronze axe.

Wave in the Falador gem store.

Equip a Mithril pickaxe, Black platebody and an Iron Kiteshield.

Wave on Mudskipper Point.

Equip a black cape, leather chaps and a steel mace.

Yawn in Draynor Marketplace.

Equip studded leather chaps, an iron kiteshield and a steel longsword.

Yawn in the Fortis Grand Museum.

Equip an emerald necklace, blue skirt, and turquoise gnome robe top.

Yawn in the Varrock library.

Equip a green gnome robe top, HAM robe bottom and an iron warhammer.

A graceful man of many colours, his crates must be full of many delights.

A town with a different sort of night-life is your destination.

Search for some crates in one of the houses.
Are you somewhat entertained?
Find a crate close to the monks that like to paaarty!
Go to the village being attacked by trolls, search the drawers in one of the houses.
Go to this building to be illuminated, and check the drawers while you are there.

I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music>

Thanks, Cecilia
In a town where everyone has perfect vision, seek some locked drawers in a house that sits opposite a workshop.
In a town where the guards are armed with maces, search the upstairs rooms of the Public House.
In a town where thieves steal from stalls, search for some drawers in the upstairs of a house near the bank.
In a town where wizards are known to gather, search upstairs in a large house to the north.
In a village made of bamboo, look for some crates under one of the houses.
Probably filled with wizards socks.
Search the basket of apples in an orchard, south of the unknown grave surrounded by white roses.
Search the crate abandoned in the shadow of a mountain's grace.
Search the upstairs drawers of a house in a village where pirates are known to have a good time.
Speak to a referee.
Speak to Donovan, the Family Handyman.
Speak to Hajedy.
Speak to Kangai Mau.
Speak to Roavar.
Speak to Uglug Nar.
Speak to Ulizius.
The dead, red dragon watches over this chest. He must really dig the view.
This crate holds a better reward than a broken arrow.
This crate is mine, all mine, even if it is in the middle of the desert.
Try not to step on any aquatic nasties while searching this crate.
You'll need to look for a town with a central fountain. Look for a locked chest in the town's chapel.

Beckon in Tai Bwo Wannai. Clap before you talk to me.

Equip green d'hide chaps, a ring of dueling and a mithril med helm.

Beckon in the Digsite, near the eastern winch. Bow before you talk to me.

Equip a green hat, snakeskin boots and an iron pickaxe.

Beckon in the Shayzien Combat Ring. Show your anger before you talk to me.

Equip an adamant platebody, adamant full helm and adamant platelegs.

Cheer in the Barbarian Agility Arena. Headbang before you talk to me.

Equip a steel platebody, maple shortbow and a Wilderness cape.

untracked: Item missing in items.json: Wilderness cape

Medium.description:
Cheer in the Edgeville general store. Dance before you talk to me.

Equip a brown apron, leather boots and leather gloves.

Cheer in the Ogre Pen in the Training Camp. Show you are angry before you talk to me.

Equip a green d'hide body and chaps and a steel square shield.

Clap in Seers court house. Spin before you talk to me.

Equip an adamant halberd, blue mystic robe bottom and a diamond ring.

Clap your hands north of Mount Karuulm. Spin before you talk to me.

Equip an adamant warhammer, mithril boots and a ring of life.

Cry in the Catherby Ranging shop. Bow before you talk to me.

Equip blue gnome boots, a hard leather body and an unblessed silver sickle.

Cry in the Draynor Village jail. Jump for joy before you talk to me.

Equip an adamant sword, a sapphire amulet and an adamant plateskirt.

Cry on the shore of Catherby beach. Laugh before you talk to me.

Equip an adamant sq shield, a bone dagger and mithril platebody.

Cry on top of the western tree in the Gnome Agility Arena. Indicate 'no' before you talk to me.

Equip a steel kiteshield, ring of forging, and green d'hide chaps.

Dance a jig under Shantay's Awning. Bow before you talk to me.

Equip a bruise blue snelm, an air staff and a bronze square shield.

Dance in the centre of Canifis. Bow before you talk to me.

Equip a green gnome robe top, mithril platelegs and an iron two-handed sword.

Dance in the dark caves beneath Lumbridge Swamp. Blow a kiss before you talk to me.

Equip an air staff, bronze full helm and an amulet of power.

Jump for Joy in the mine near the Twilight Temple. Bow before you talk to me.

Equip a maple longbow, a ruby amulet and some steel platelegs.

Jump for joy in the TzHaar sword shop. Shrug before you talk to me.

Equip a steel longsword, blue d'hide body and blue mystic gloves.

Jump for joy in Yanille bank. Dance a jig before you talk to me.

Equip a brown apron, adamantite medium helm and snakeskin chaps.

Nod your head where the River Ortus meets the Proudspire. Indicate 'no' before you talk to me.

Equip a blue wizard hat, a blue wizard robe and wear nothing on your legs.

Panic by the mausoleum in Morytania. Wave before you speak to me.

Equip a mithril plate skirt, maple longbow and no boots.

Shrug in Catherby bank. Yawn before you talk to me.

Equip a maple longbow, green d'hide chaps and an iron med helm.

Spin on the bridge by the Barbarian Village. Salute before you talk to me.

Equip purple gloves, a steel kiteshield and a mithril full helm.

Think in the centre of the Observatory. Spin before you talk to me.

Equip a mithril chainbody, green dragonhide chaps and a ruby amulet.

Yawn in the Castle Wars lobby. Shrug before you talk to me.

Equip a ruby amulet, a mithril scimitar and a Wilderness cape.

untracked: Item missing in items.json: Wilderness cape

Medium.description:
Yawn in the centre of Arceuus library. Nod your head before you talk to me.

Equip blue dragonhide vambraces, adamant boots and an adamant dagger.

46 is my number. My body is the colour of burnt orange and crawls among those with eight. Three mouths I have, yet I cannot eat. My blinking blue eye hides my grave.
'A bag belt only?', he asked his balding brothers.
A general who sets a 'shining' example.
A great view - watch the rapidly drying hides get splashed. Check the box you are sitting on.
Aggie I see, Lonely and southern I feel I am neither inside nor outside the house yet no house would be complete without me. The treasure lies beneath me!
AIQ 0440
AIR 2331
AJP 3015
ALP 1140

And so on, and so on, and so on.

Walking from the land of many unimportant things leads to a choice of paths.
BIP 7013
BJR 1123
BLP 6200
CIS 0009
Citric cellar.
CKP 0224
Come have a cip with this great soot covered denizen.
Come to the evil ledge, Yew know yew want to. Try not to get stung.
Covered in shadows, the centre of the circle is where you will find the answer.
Dig in the lair of red wings, within the temple of the Sun and moon.
Dig where 4 siblings and I all live with our evil overlord.
DIP 8511
DKS 2310
Four blades I have, yet draw no blood; Still I turn my prey to powder. If you are brave, come search my roof; It is there my blades are louder.
Generally speaking, his nose was very bent.
Gold I see, yet gold I require. Give me 875 if death you desire.
He knows just how easy it is to lose track of time.
His head might be hollow, but the crates nearby are filled with surprises.

I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music>

Thanks, Cecilia

I am a token of the greatest love. I have no beginning or end. My eye is red, I can fit like a glove. Go to the place where it's money they lend,

And dig by the gate to be my friend.
I have many arms but legs, I have just one. I have little family but my seed you can grow on, I am not dead, yet I am but a spirit, and my power, on your quests, you will earn the right to free it.

I lie lonely and forgotten in mid wilderness, where the dead rise from their beds.

Feel free to quarrel and wind me up and dig while you shoot their heads.
I sit on the beach and cry for those that have passed on.
I watch the sea. I watch you fish. I watch your tree.

Identify the back of this over-acting brother.

(He's a long way from home.)
If a man carried my burden, he would break his back. I am not rich, but leave silver in my track. Speak to the keeper of my trail.
If you look closely enough, it seems that the archers have lost more than their needles.
In the city where merchants are said to have lived, talk to a man with a splendid cape, but a hat dropped by goblins.
It seems to have reached the end of the line, and it's still empty.
Leader of the Yak City.
Mine was the strangest birth under the sun. I left the crimson sack, yet life had not begun. Entered the world, and yet was seen by none.
Must be full of railings.
My giant guardians below the market streets would be fans of rock and roll, if only they could grab hold of it. Dig near my green bubbles!
My home is grey, and made of stone; A castle with a search for a meal. Hidden in some drawers I am, across from a wooden wheel.

My name is like a tree, yet it is spelt with a 'g'.

Come see the fur which is right near me.
Often sought out by scholars of histories past, find me where words of wisdom speak volumes.
Probably filled with books on magic.
Read 'How to breed scorpions.' By O.W.Thathurt.
Rotting next to a ditch. Dig next to the fish.

'Small shoe.'

Often found with rod on mushroom.
Snah? I feel all confused, like one of those cakes...
Surprising? I bet he is...
Surviving.
The beasts to my east snap claws and tails, The rest to my west can slide and eat fish. The force to my north will jump and they'll wail, Come dig by my fire and make a wish.
The Big High War God left his mark on this place.
The cheapest water for miles around, but they react badly to religious icons.
The effects of this fire are magnified.
The keeper of Melzars...Spare? Skeleton? Anar?
The King's magic shouldn't be wasted by me.
The magic of 4 colours, an early experience you could learn. The large beast caged up top, rages, as his demised kin's loot now returns.
The mother of the reptilian sacrifice.
THEY'RE EVERYWHERE!!!! But they were here first. Dig for treasure where the ground is rich with ore.
This aviator is at the peak of his profession.

This village has a problem with cartloads of the undead.

Try checking the bookcase to find an answer.
Try not to let yourself be dazzled when you search these drawers.
When no weapons are at hand, then is the time to reflect. In Saradomin's name, redemption draws closer...
When you get tired of fighting, go deep, deep down until you need an antidote.
Where the best are commemorated, and a celebratory cup, not just for beer.

You have all of the elements available to solve this clue.

Fortunately you do not have to go as far as to stand in a draft.
You will need to under-cook to solve this one.

Beckon on the east coast of the Kharazi Jungle. Beware of double agents!

Equip any vestment stole and a heraldic rune shield.

Equip a blue mystic hat, bone spear and rune platebody.

Cheer at the top of the agility pyramid. Beware of double agents!

Equip a blue mystic robe top, and any rune heraldic shield.

Dance at the cat-doored pyramid in Sophanem. Beware of double agents!

Equip a ring of life, an uncharged amulet of glory and an adamant two-handed sword.

Headbang at the exam centre. Beware of double agents!

Equip a mystic fire staff, a diamond bracelet and rune boots.

Jig at Jiggig. Beware of double agents!

Equip a rune spear, rune platelegs and any rune heraldic helm.

Laugh in Jokul's tent in the Mountain Camp. Beware of double agents!

Equip a rune full helmet, blue d'hide chaps and a fire battlestaff.

Panic by the pilot on White Wolf Mountain. Beware of double agents!

Equip mithril platelegs, a ring of life, and a rune axe.

Panic in the heart of the Haunted Woods. Beware of double agents!

Have no items equipped when you do.

Panic on the Wilderness volcano bridge. Beware of double agents!

Equip any headband and crozier.

Panic outside the Twilight Temple. Beware of double agents!

Equip a rune longsword, rune platebody and a rune plateskirt.

Salute in the banana plantation. Beware of double agents!

Equip a diamond ring, amulet of power, and nothing on your chest and legs.

Salute in the centre of the mess hall. Beware of double agents!

Equip a rune halberd, rune platebody and an amulet of strength.

Shrug in the woods east of the Level 19 Wilderness Obelisk. Beware of double agents!

Equip rune platelegs, an iron platebody and blue d'hide vambraces.

Yawn in the rogues' general store. Beware of double agents!

Equip an adamant square shield, blue dragon vambraces and a rune pickaxe.

A demon's best friend holds the next step of this clue.
A Guthixian ring lies between two peaks. Search the stones and you'll find what you seek.
A reck you say; let's pray there aren't any ghosts.
A ring of water surrounds 4 powerful rings, dig above the ladder located there.
Banish a chilling spirit.
Crush the spirited earth.
Desert insects is what I see. Taking care of them was my responsibility. Your solution is found by digging near me.
Dig under Razorlor's toad batta.
Dig where the forces of Zamorak and Saradomin collide.
Dobson is my last name, and with gardening I seek fame.
Does one really need a fire to stay warm here?
Even the seers say this clue goes right over their heads.
Ghostly bones.
Green is the colour of my death as the winter-guise, I swoop towards the ground.
Has no one told you it is rude to ask a lady her age?
His bark is worse than his bite.
I am the one who watches the giants. The giants in turn watch me. I watch with two while they watch with one. Come seek where I may be.
I burn between heroes and legends.
I live in a deserted crack collecting soles.
In a while...
Let's hope you don't meet a watery death when you encounter this fiend.
Mix yellow with blue and add heat, make sure you bring protection.
More resources than I can handle, but in a very dangerous area. Can't wait to strike gold!
Observing someone in a swamp, under the telescope lies treasure.
Reflection is the weakness for these eyes of evil.
Right on the blessed border, cursed by the evil ones. On the spot inaccessible by both; I will be waiting. The bugs' imminent possession holds the answer.
Scattered coins and gems fill the floor. The chest you seek is in the north east.
'See you in your dreams' said the vegetable man.
Show this to Sherlock.
Speak to a Wyse man.
Surround my bones in fire, on top the wooden pyre. Finally lay me to rest, before my one last test.
The beasts retreat, for their Queen is gone; the song of this town still plays on. Dig near the birthplace of a blade, be careful not to melt your spade.
Their bane awaits, but don't be going in there without permission.
Three rule below and three sit at top. Come dig at my entrance.
Varrock is where I reside, not the land of the dead, but I am so old, I should be there instead. Let's hope your reward is as good as it says, just 1 gold one and you can have it read.
With a name like that, you'd expect a little more than just a few scimitars.
W marks the spot.
With drinks and dwarves I make my way, upon my head a glass will stay.
You'll get licked.
You'll have to plug your nose if you use this source of herbs.
You might have to turn over a few stones to progress.
You must be 100 to play with me.
You were 3 and I was the 6th. Come speak to me.
You will have to fly high where a sword cannot help you.

2 musical birds. Dig in front of the spinning light.
A chisel and hammer reside in his home, strange for one of magic. Impress him with your magical equipment.
A dwarf, approaching death, but very much in the light.
A massive battle rages beneath so be careful when you dig by the large broken crossbow.
Anger Abbot Langley.
Anger those who adhere to Saradomin's edicts to prevent travel.

Buried beneath the ground, who knows where it's found.

Lucky for you, A man called Jorral may have a clue.
Come brave adventurer, your sense is on fire. If you talk to me, it's an old god you desire.
Darkness wanders around me, but fills my mind with knowledge.
Dig in front of the icy arena where 1 of 4 was fought.
Faint sounds of 'Arr', fire giants found deep, the eastern tip of a lake, are the rewards you could reap.
Falo the bard wants to see you.
Elvish onions.
Fiendish cooks probably won't dig the dirty dishes.
The doorman of the Warriors' Guild wishes to be impressed by how strong your equipment is.
Great demons, dragons, and spiders protect this blue rock, beneath which, you may find what you seek.
Guthix left his mark in a fiery lake, dig at the tip of it.
Here, there are tears, but nobody is crying. Speak to the guardian and show off your alignment to balance.
Hopefully this set of armour will help you to keep surviving.
If you're feeling brave, dig beneath the dragon's eye.
I lie beneath the first descent to the holy encampment.
My life was spared but these voices remain, now guarding these iron gates is my bane.
One of several rhyming brothers, in business attire with an obsession for paper work.
Pentagrams and demons, burnt bones and remains, I wonder what the blood contains.
Robin wishes to see your finest ranged equipment.
She's small but can build both literally and figuratively.
Shhhh!
Show this to Sherlock.
South of a river in a town surrounded by the undead, what lies beneath the furnace?
The far north eastern corner where 1 of 4 was defeated, the shadows still linger.
This place sure is a mess.
Under a giant robotic bird that cannot fly.
Where safe to speak, the man who offers the pouch of smallest size wishes to see your alignment.
